summary: All authentication and session management features tested and working correctly. The Google OAuth fix (storing session_token in localStorage) is properly implemented. Email/Password login also stores session_token correctly. Protected routes redirect to login when unauthenticated. Teachers page remains public.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthCallback.js correctly stores session_token from response.data.session_token in localStorage (line 36-38)
Backend /auth/session endpoint correctly returns session_token in response body (server.py line 537)
LoginPage.js correctly stores session_token after email/password login (line 77, 95)
api.js interceptor correctly sends X-Session-Token header from localStorage (line 16-18)
seed_data_creation: Test users created during UI testing with pattern test_*@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google OAuth session_token fix verified. Key changes: 1) AuthCallback.js now stores response.data.session_token in localStorage, 2) Backend /auth/session returns session_token in response body, 3) Email/Password login also stores session_token correctly. All protected routes (/book/:teacherId, /dashboard/*) redirect to login when unauthenticated. Teachers page is PUBLIC.

google_oauth_callback_stores_session_tok.details: AuthCallback.js line 36-38 stores response.data.session_token in localStorage. Backend /auth/session returns session_token in response body.

email_password_login_stores_session_toke.details: LoginPage.js stores session_token after login. Verified via Playwright test - session_token stored in localStorage after login.

protected_routes_redirect_to_login.details: Unauthenticated users redirected to /login when accessing /book/:teacherId or /dashboard/*

session_persists_across_refresh.details: After login, page refresh keeps user on dashboard - session persists correctly

booking_flow_works_after_login.details: After login, user can navigate to /book/:teacherId and see available time slots

teachers_page_is_public.details: Teachers page accessible without authentication, shows 3 teachers
